siteTagline: Class notes, practical guides, and cheat sheets for the IT program at Hunar Institute — free to download, anytime.
author: M.Khan Jamali
institute: Hunar Institute of Vocational Training, Dadu
aboutText: Hunar IT Hub is a free, open library of class notes for the IT program at Hunar Institute of Vocational Training, Dadu. Every file here is the same material covered in class, organized into a searchable archive — so revising for a test or catching up after missing a session takes minutes, not a message to your teacher. No sign-in, no fees, no ads.

categories.name: Computer Fundamentals
categories.description: Hardware, software, and the basics every student starts with.

files.title: Introduction to Computers
files.description: Hardware vs software, input/output devices, and basic terminology.

files.title: Operating System Basics
files.description: Files, folders, desktop navigation, and everyday shortcuts.

categories.name: MS Word Essentials
categories.description: Formatting, templates, and everyday document skills.

files.title: Getting Started with MS Word
files.description: Interface tour, typing, saving, and printing documents.

files.title: Formatting & Page Layout
files.description: Fonts, styles, headers/footers, and page setup.

categories.name: Browsing Internet & Managing Emails
categories.description: A 16-chapter course on browsers, safe browsing, and everyday email management.

files.title: Chapter 1 · Internet Fundamentals
files.description: What the internet is, how it works, and how to search.

files.title: Chapter 2 · Web Browsers
files.description: Exploring browsers, their features, and how to use them.

files.title: Chapter 3 · Effective Browsing
files.description: Navigation, tabs, history, and smart search techniques.

files.title: Chapter 4 · Download & Upload
files.description: Managing file transfers between your device and the internet.

files.title: Chapter 5 · Browser Settings
files.description: Customising your browser for security, privacy, and efficiency.

categories.name: MS Excel Essentials
categories.description: Spreadsheets, formulas, and everyday data organization.
